{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231555351341980470D45EDE90FB"}"},"total":350},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7569614917070930713","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"题材特别好看。
我最满意的一点是：女主是无可争辩的话事人。扮猪吃老虎，实力强大。而且不圣母，当断则断。
女主手缝有点大，不过剧情又把这一点写得很合理，而且也没有因此而产生其他隐患。
我是看到快完结了才评价的（最后一个学院建设中了），真得很好看。","text_exts":[{"e":34,"s":29,"text":"扮猪吃老虎","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%89%AE%E7%8C%AA%E5%90%83%E8%80%81%E8%99%8E&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742525355EDE90FB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227569614917070930713%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227371443070874684441%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%89%AE%E7%8C%AA%E5%90%83%E8%80%81%E8%99%8E%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762439785,"group_id":"7371443070874684441","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7GzCLEUu/l/mYXlQLXKTNk=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"979019111611908","user_name":"钱庄的姜梦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"979019111611908","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7371443070874684441","book_info":{"abstract":"爱玩基建游戏的凌烟儿，没想到带着手机穿到了修真界。
开局一个茅草屋，如果不想一个人呆在这破地方，就必须招生搞建设。
凌烟儿不得不跟着游戏系统在这修真界玩真人基建游戏。
乾天宗弃徒，招进来当老师！
灵根受损的柳家少主，招进来当学生！
到处抓人搞祭祀活动的魔修，招进来当老师！
妖族那七百岁的妖皇非要来上学！
只要你交了学费，那你就是学生！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/06e5e4c13576dbc073302f6991802c7d","author":"烤了红薯","author_id":"","book_id":"7371443070874684441","book_name":"异世基建：我有一个修仙学院","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d8b8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5686人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":248,"name":"玄幻言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=248&name=玄幻言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7371443193587450393","read_count":"5686","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1096052"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"674","tags":"玄幻言情,古代言情,穿越,异世穿越,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/278b8b6f66075bec011bef572b028f81~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779436535&x-signature=yG3F3Zv3LnZaD712z5F9JweCsmA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4133752103771454","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"670"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231555351341980470D45EDE90FB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读17小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":61867,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":7012},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_dig
